title: Legal-source authority hierarchy, corpus scope, coverage matrix, and internal legal-source manifest contract
objective: First-wave lane 1 (D-002 Section 7.1); contracted from post-#97 main. Establish: (a) docs/SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md  -  a 7-tier PROVENANCE-CLASSIFICATION hierarchy (tier 1 current enacted/adopted law; tier 2 official amendments + project-specific legal instruments; tier 3 official agency interpretations; tier 4 official factual datasets; tier 5 third-party references cross-check only; tier 6 architect/client documents; tier 7 AI = no authority) that is EXPLICITLY NOT an automatic conflict-resolution ranking (see items below); (b) docs/LEGAL_CORPUS_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md  -  every declared domain with exactly one status from the authoritative vocabulary AND the six actionable columns; (c) additive DOB Construction-Code / Local Law / DOB Rule / Buildings Bulletin / Code-Note-directive / formal-DOB-interpretation channels in docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md; (d) docs/CONSTRUCTION_CODE_RELEASE_SCOPE.md  -  a DRAFT scope artifact for owner approval (clears B-011, gates M3-T005 construction-code); (e) project-control/reports/M3-T001-architect-benchmark-analysis.md  -  hash + observations + required discrepancies ONLY (no PDF, no inferred identity); (f) a versioned internal legal_source_manifest schema; (g) docs/DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md  -  the document-evidence-state POLICY foundation for the M3-T003 evidence engine. The policy MUST state the three-truths accuracy boundary (EXTRACTION truth = what the official document visibly states; LEGAL truth = does the provision apply to this property/as-of date; MATHEMATICAL truth = was the calculation correct on approved inputs)  -  no OCR/parser/AI/calculator resolves all three; that native PDF extraction, OCR output, AI extraction, and human legal interpretation are DIFFERENT evidence states; that OCR output has NO independent legal authority; that extracted text inherits the official document's provenance ONLY after required evidence verification; that extraction verification is NOT legal G6 verification; and it must forbid the prohibited claims (100% accurate OCR / 100% legally accurate / OCR-confidence-proves-correctness / two-engines-agree-therefore-verified / arithmetic-consistency-proves-rule-correct). NO single complete/compliant/buildable label while any material domain is unresolved. AI retrieves/classifies/drafts/explains only; humans approve legal interpretation and release scope. Full spec: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md.
business_reason: M3 legal corpus is an undelivered dependency for M4 rule publication and every yard/coverage slice; the authority hierarchy (provenance, not auto-precedence), the actionable coverage matrix, and a frozen construction-code release scope make completeness auditable and legally honest instead of asserted from one manually-read chapter. Also corrects the 'confirmed absence' overreach. | D-002 first-wave lane 1; carried from PR #93 (superseded) with the D-002 regime stamp added.
inputs: M1-T001 accepted official-source registry research (docs/research/source-registry-drafts/*.json, docs/research/*.md)  -  provenance and access-governance baseline
docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md (governance rules incl. ZoLa-presentation-only + Socrata baseline; section 8 ZR portal)  -  READ; extend additively with the new legal channels

Architect benchmark: one-page sheet '2 OF 2', SHA-256 9442b5002e10b8ac0d9f78500db7cd4e8b34240e9155d0c61bbb51e00407ea85; identity fields BLANK; observed statements R5 / 40x125=5,000 sf / sec.23-361 60% 3,000 allowed 2,850 proposed / sec.23-21 1.50 7,500 allowed 7,602 proposed / sec.23-422 35ft,45ft with 15ft setback 35 proposed / front 10 / rear 20 / side 5  -  ADVERSARIAL, not an answer key (B-010)
ZR sec.11-25 (suffix inheritance), sec.12-10 (definitions/lot taxonomy), sec.23-361/sec.23-21/sec.23-422 (benchmark sections)  -  official ZR portal text
PRD (product claims to be supported) + docs/PRODUCT_FLOW_AND_AI_BOUNDARIES.md (AI boundaries)  -  inputs to the construction-code release-scope draft
outputs: docs/SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md  -  7-tier provenance classification + the explicit precedence-resolution rules (jurisdiction, legal status, effective/as-of date, amendment/supersession/rescission, scope specificity; unresolved -> data_conflict/professional_review_required; AI proposes, never approves)

docs/LEGAL_CORPUS_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md  -  every domain row with {status, controlling official source channel or unavailable-document class, evidence/as-of date, implementing task ID or human-action blocker, downstream claims blocked, next action + responsible reviewer}; the authoritative status vocabulary + its mapping to runtime rule-evaluation outcomes

docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md  -  additive rows: DOB Construction Code, Local Law, DOB Rule, Buildings Bulletin, Code Note/directive, formal DOB interpretation (each: official source identity, access mode, auth, published limits or 'none published', last-policy-verification date, 'to verify at G1'); ZoLa reaffirmed presentation-only; UpCodes recorded reference-only with dated API-availability + subscription/pricing note + 'program does not require it'

docs/CONSTRUCTION_CODE_RELEASE_SCOPE.md  -  DRAFT for owner approval (code edition + as-of date; product claims supported; exact in-scope titles/chapters/domains; required LL/DOB-Rule/Bulletin/Code-Note/rescission/supersession channels; explicitly excluded domains; consumer claim each exclusion blocks). Clears B-011 on owner approval; no authority until approved

docs/DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md  -  three-truths accuracy boundary; evidence-state definitions (native/OCR/AI/human are distinct states; OCR has no independent legal authority; extraction verification is NOT G6); prohibited-claims list; the integration boundary (rule engine never reads raw OCR strings) that M3-T003/M3-T004 implement

packages/contracts/schemas/v1/legal_source_manifest.schema.json  -  NEW versioned internal manifest schema (additive; deterministic version + $id; NOT promoted to a canonical cross-tier contract without a justified cross-tier consumer)
packages/contracts/schemas/v1/fixtures/legal_source_manifest/{positive,negative}/*.json  -  executable schema-validation fixtures (positive validates; negatives missing provenance/version/hash fail)
project-control/reports/M3-T001-architect-benchmark-analysis.md  -  SHA-256 + observed statements + the six required discrepancy findings; no PDF bytes, no inferred address/BBL/job
allowed_paths: docs/DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md (NEW  -  document-evidence-state policy foundation for M3-T003)
docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md (ADDITIVE new channel sections only; existing accepted rows byte-unchanged)

packages/contracts/fixtures/valid/legal_source_manifest/ (D-003 amendment: relocated from schemas/v1/fixtures to the conventional fixtures tree the CI validator instance-checks; positive manifest fixtures for AS-11)
packages/contracts/fixtures/invalid/legal_source_manifest/ (D-003 amendment: negative manifest fixtures that MUST fail schema validation)
packages/contracts/fixtures/legal_source_manifest/ (D-003 amendment: the check_m3_t001.py self-check harness, relocated with the fixtures)
forbidden_paths: Committing the client architect PDF anywhere; inferring benchmark project address/BBL/job/checked-by from metadata/filename
Treating the 7 provenance tiers as an automatic conflict-resolution ranking (an older consolidated portal page must not defeat a later effective amendment by tier number)
Recording UpCodes/ZoLa as controlling provenance or adding a runtime dependency on either; approving the construction-code release scope (owner-only, B-011)
Any services/api/app runtime code or connector implementation; any canonical contract redefinition (property_profile/rule_evaluation/coverage_status/scenario)
apps/web/** and any 3D/UI; any rule publication or Verified labeling; project-control/** except own reports + B-011 reference; .claude/** except own agent-memory
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 authority hierarchy is provenance, not auto-precedence: SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md defines all 7 tiers AND states explicitly that tier number is a provenance class, not a conflict winner.
AS-2 coverage-matrix domain completeness: every domain in the replan proposal appears with exactly one status from the authoritative vocabulary.

AS-3 coverage-matrix actionability (item 7): every row records status + controlling official channel/unavailable-document class + evidence/as-of date + implementing task ID or human-action blocker + downstream claims blocked + next action + responsible reviewer; NO missing/partial/conflicting/unsupported/professional_review_required row lacks a task, blocker, or explicit continuing limitation.
AS-4 no false aggregate: a machine check asserts the absence of any single complete/compliant/buildable label while any domain is unresolved.

AS-5 registry additions: SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md gains additive rows for EVERY channel M3-T005 names (Construction Code, Local Law, DOB Rule, Buildings Bulletin, Code Note/directive, formal DOB interpretation); existing accepted rows byte-unchanged; ZoLa presentation-only + UpCodes reference-only (dated API-availability/subscription/pricing + 'not required') recorded.

AS-6 unverified source cannot pass G1 as verified (item 8): a channel whose official source identity, endpoint, access mode, terms, or required download URL is unresolved carries 'to verify at G1' in the proposal but is recorded as BLOCKED (not verified)  -  G1 blocks that channel rather than accepting it on faith.

AS-7 benchmark analysis honesty: the benchmark report records the SHA-256 + observed statements, surfaces 7,602 vs the sheet's stated 7,500 cap (102 sf over), no floor-area-exclusion schedule supplied, 60% lot coverage not selectable until legal lot type + residence type known, 15-ft setback branch depends on narrow-street/vertical-envelope conditions, side-yard depends on building type (may require two yards), project identity + zoning-lot docs missing  -  emitting NO buildable/compliant conclusion and NO inferred identity.

AS-8 precedence resolution rules (item 4): SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md requires deterministic resolution to consider jurisdiction, legal status, effective/as-of date, explicit amendment/supersession/rescission, and scope specificity; an adopted amendment becomes current law (a later effective amendment is not defeated by an older consolidated page); a legally effective project-specific instrument (variance/special permit/restrictive declaration/zoning-lot agreement) may control the affected property though narrower than citywide law; unresolved precedence/applicability -> data_conflict or professional_review_required (never a silent pick); AI proposes relationships, never approves a legal interpretation.

AS-9 vocabulary reconciliation (item 5): one authoritative status vocabulary is defined and mapped to runtime rule-evaluation outcomes, distinguishing at least missing / not_evaluated / unsupported / conflicting / professional_review_required / not_applicable (plus implemented / partial for domain roll-up); not_applicable may be assigned ONLY after applicability is affirmatively resolved; unknown/missing never becomes not_applicable or false.

AS-10 construction-code scope artifact drafted (item 6): docs/CONSTRUCTION_CODE_RELEASE_SCOPE.md exists as a DRAFT identifying code edition + as-of date, product claims supported, exact in-scope titles/chapters/domains, required LL/DOB-Rule/Bulletin/Code-Note/rescission/supersession channels, excluded domains, and the consumer claim each exclusion blocks; it carries no authority and B-011 gates its approval.

AS-11 legal_source_manifest schema validation (executable): (a) legal_source_manifest.schema.json itself passes JSON Schema meta-validation; (b) a complete positive manifest fixture validates against it; (c) negative fixtures each missing a required provenance / corpus-version / raw-hash field FAIL validation; (d) the schema's version and $id are deterministic (byte-identical across regeneration); (e) it is NOT promoted into a canonical cross-tier contract without a justified cross-tier consumer.

AS-12 document-evidence policy: docs/DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md states the three-truths accuracy boundary; defines native/OCR/AI/human as distinct evidence states; states OCR output has no independent legal authority and that extraction verification is NOT G6; forbids the prohibited claims list; and states the integration boundary (rule engine never reads raw OCR strings; missing/unresolved/conflicting/stale/out-of-scope upstream -> missing/not_evaluated/unsupported/data_conflict/professional_review_required, never a default/nearest/not_applicable/compliant/feasible/buildable value). A grep asserts none of the prohibited claim strings appear as system guarantees anywhere in M3 deliverables.
NC-1 absence discipline: no deliverable states a modifier is 'confirmed absent'; absence is only unsupported/not_evaluated/professional_review_required until closure (M3-T004).
NC-2 no PDF / no identity leak: a grep confirms the client PDF bytes are not committed and no project address/BBL/job string appears in any output.
NC-3 tier discipline: no third-party reference (UpCodes/ZoLa etc.) is recorded as controlling provenance; both are non-runtime cross-check/presentation only.
risks: Contracted as first-wave lane 1 (D-002); a producer implements it in an isolated worktree; M3-T002..T005 remain backlog and sequential (M3-T002 needs accepted M3-T001).

PROVENANCE != PRECEDENCE: the 7 tiers classify source provenance; conflict resolution is by jurisdiction/legal-status/effective-date/amendment-supersession/scope, with data_conflict/professional_review_required on any unresolved precedence  -  never a silent tier-number pick.
SCOPE IS OWNER-ONLY: docs/CONSTRUCTION_CODE_RELEASE_SCOPE.md is a DRAFT; B-011 (owner approval) gates M3-T005 construction-code; AI has no authority to set release scope.
G1 HONESTY: 'to verify at G1' is a proposal marker only; an unresolved source identity/endpoint/access/terms/download URL is BLOCKED at G1, never accepted as verified.
IDENTITY/PRIVACY: the client benchmark PDF must not be committed; blank identity fields must not be inferred (B-010).
NO NEW RUNTIME DEPENDENCY: stdlib + existing jsonschema; no requests/httpx/UpCodes-SDK/scraping/AI framework.
requirement_refs: docs/GATES_AND_CHECKPOINTS.md (G0-G5; G6 reserved for rule publication)
docs/PRODUCT_FLOW_AND_AI_BOUNDARIES.md (AI retrieves/classifies/drafts/explains; humans approve legal interpretation)
ZR sec.11-25, sec.12-10, sec.23-361, sec.23-21, sec.23-422 (official portal)
harness_assignments: (defines, does not execute)  -  establishes the authoritative status vocabulary, the provenance-vs-precedence rules, and the coverage-matrix schema that the downstream source-fidelity, cross-reference-closure, lot/applicability, rule-behavior, architect-benchmark, and consumer-boundary harnesses assert against.
